past_projects.project: AMC GIS – CityLayers Platform & GIS Solution Implementation
past_projects.client: Ahmedabad Municipal Corporation (AMC)
past_projects.consortium_lead: Navayuga Spatial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. Hyderabad
past_projects.wo_ref: WO No. 928 dtd 02/07/2015 (Tender: AMC-GIS-2014-15/05); Completion Certificate dtd 25/10/2019; Client Certificate dtd 22/11/2019
past_projects.scope: Supply, installation and maintenance of GIS base solution (CityLayers Platform) for AMC. Base map creation using 0.3m HRSI (Total area 466 Sq.Km). Geo-referencing and digitization of Town Planning sheets. DGPS and Total Station survey for ground truthing. Property tagging of approx. 18.5 Lakh properties via door-to-door survey and property assessment verification. Creation of utility layers: Sewer
past_projects.technology: CityLayers Enterprise GIS Platform, DGPS Survey, Total Station Survey, HRSI (0.3m), PostGIS, GeoServer, Java, OpenLayers, Apache Tomcat, PostgreSQL / PostGIS, Web GIS Application, Desktop GIS, ESRI ArcGIS (initial), mWeb Mobile
past_projects.docs_available: Work Order No. 928 dtd 02/07/2015, Client Certificate dtd 22/11/2019 from I/C Manager (E-GOV) AMC, Completion Certificate dtd 25/10/2019
